title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1665 - Recognition of order modified in another state
text:
454.1665.  Recognition of order modified in another state. — If a child support order issued by a tribunal of this state is modified by a tribunal of another state which assumed jurisdiction pursuant to the Uniform Interstate Family Support Act, a tribunal of this state:
  (1)  may enforce its order that was modified only as to arrears and interest accruing before the modification;
  (2)  may provide appropriate relief for violations of its order which occurred before the effective date of the modification; and
  (3)  shall recognize the modifying order of the other state, upon registration, for the purpose of enforcement.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
